# Pull Request Description Instructions

## Overview

Provide a clear, concise summary of the changes in this pull request.

## Title

- Use imperative mood (e.g., "Add feature" not "Added feature")
- Keep under 50 characters
- Be specific about what changed

## Description Sections

### What changed

- List the main modifications
- Explain the purpose of each change

### Why this change

- Describe the problem being solved
- Reference related issues (e.g., `Fixes #123`, `Closes #456`)

### How to test

- Provide step-by-step testing instructions
- Include expected outcomes

### Additional notes (optional)

- Breaking changes
- Dependencies added/removed
- Configuration changes needed
- Related PRs or documentation

## Tips

- Use clear, professional language
- Keep paragraphs short
- Use bullet points for lists
- Link to relevant documentation
- Mention reviewers if needed
